name: sinemacula/coding-standards-laravel
description: Laravel-specific coding standards, static-analysis rules, and code-quality tooling for Sine Macula's Laravel repositories.

suggest.phpstan/phpstan-phpunit: PHPUnit-aware PHPStan rules. Auto-registers via phpstan/extension-installer.
suggest.phpstan/extension-installer: Auto-registers the Laravel PHPStan rules (required for the shared php/phpstan-laravel.neon to load).

scripts-descriptions.check: Run static analysis and lint checks via qlty.
scripts-descriptions.smells: Report code smells (duplication, complexity) via qlty.
scripts-descriptions.analyse: Run PHPStan over the repo's own sniffs and rules (phpstan.neon.dist).
scripts-descriptions.test: Run the PHPUnit sniff/rule test suite.
scripts-descriptions.test:coverage: Run the PHPUnit suite with Clover coverage output (requires Xdebug).
